title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Casa Grande

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Casa Grande
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Casa Grande. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Casa Grande:
Casa Grande is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Casa Grande!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
